content: GIET University, Gunupur, Rayagada NATIONAL CADET CORPS 13(0) BN NCC, ARMY WING Ref No: 3675 Date:14.11.2022 NOTICE ENROLLMENT IN NCC (2022-2023) GIET University NCC Unit is inviting applications from BOYS & GIRLS candidates of the University desirous to be enrolled in National Cadet Corps (NCC) for the academic year 2022- 2023(only for 2022 batch students). Interested candidates may apply on the prescribed format or visit NCC office to obtain application form during office hours. Filled in application form can also be sent through email: trilochan.nayak@giet.edu. As seats are limited only those students who have inclination for defense/armed services should apply. On the basis of your application, provisional list will be prepared. Final selected applicants will have to go through physical fitness test which will be conducted by the 13(O) BN Army NCC, Nabarangpur. Students have to come for screening on 17" November, 2022 at 8:00am at University Sports Ground. Note: Candidate’s age should be between 18 years to 22 years. Last Date of Submission of Application is 17th November, 2022. For any queries contact the undersigned. \ Mr. Trilochan Naya NCC Officer, GIET University Mob-7064325472 Email- trilochan.nayak@giet.edu Copy to:- 1. Vice-chancellor 2. Registrar 3. Dean academics 4. Heads of Departments 5. Wardens, Boys & Girl’s Hostels for information 6. GIET University Website In-charge

Final selected applicants will have to go through physical fitness test which will be conducted by the 13(O) BN Army NCC, Nabarangpur. \ Mr. Trilochan Naya NCC Officer, GIET University Mob-7064325472 Email- trilochan.nayak@giet.edu Copy to:- 1.
